title: coelogyne bontocensis
intro: Coelogyne bontocensis is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, specifically found in the provinces of Mountain Province and Kalinga. This orchid is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, and its ability to stimulate the immune system. The health benefits of Coelogyne bontocensis include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations involve drying and grinding the roots of the plant, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal use.
